get.summary: Memberships points daily Rewards status retrieve.

AuthToken.description: SDKWork auth token carried as Authorization: Bearer <auth_token>.

data.description: Operation-specific payload typed per response schema.

item.description: Typed domain resource for the operation.

SdkWorkPlatformErrorCode.description: Platform or domain error code per API_SPEC.md §15.3.

CommerceOperationCommand.description: Membership operation command. purchase/renew/upgrade require packageId, orderId, and requestNo from order memberships.orders.create.

orderId.description: Commerce order UUID from order memberships.orders.create.

requestNo.description: Human-readable order number from order memberships.orders.create.

displayValue.description: Raw text value for non-numeric benefit display (e.g. 2K, 4K/8K, 8折算力元). Present when grant_quantity is not a pure number.

AppMembershipPurchaseOutcome.description: Membership reservation outcome. Order and payment modules own cashier and payment execution fields.

requestNo.description: Human-readable order number for cashier display.
